requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Honduras BESS Project and Finance Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为洪都拉斯BESS项目和融资验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為宏都拉斯BESS項目和融資驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Honduras does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS product safety regulation requiring IEC 62619 certification as a pre-market or pre-import condition. OHN (Organismo Hondureño de Normalización), Honduras's national standards body, adopts and publishes Honduran national standards (NHN); OHN has not been confirmed as having published a mandatory BESS-specific product safety technical regulation equivalent to an IEC 62619-based certification route as of the dataset date — verify the current OHN regulated-product list directly with OHN and CREE before shipment. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and is expected to be required in project procurement specifications for Honduras BESS projects funded by international development finance institutions (IDB — Inter-American Development Bank, CAF — Development Bank of Latin America, World Bank / IFC), and in CREE-licensed engineering reviews and ENEE interconnection technical assessments for utility-scale projects. The context for BESS in Honduras is genuine: Honduras has high solar penetration (renewable energy penetration has reached significant levels) creating grid-stability and frequency-firming needs; BESS for frequency regulation, solar firming, and peak-shaving represent commercially viable applications. Exporters should verify the current OHN and CREE regulated-product requirements directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全国家法规，将IEC 62619认证作为上市或进口前置条件。OHN（洪都拉斯标准化机构）是洪都拉斯国家标准机构，负责采纳和发布洪都拉斯国家标准（NHN）；截至本数据集日期，尚未确认OHN已发布等同于基于IEC 62619认证路径的强制性BESS专属产品安全技术法规——须在出货前直接向OHN和CREE核实现行OHN受监管产品清单。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，预计将在国际开发融资机构（IDB——美洲开发银行、CAF——拉丁美洲开发银行、世界银行/IFC）资助的洪都拉斯BESS项目采购规格，以及公用事业规模项目的CREE持牌工程审查和ENEE并网技术评估中被要求。洪都拉斯对BESS的需求背景真实：洪都拉斯太阳能渗透率高（可再生能源渗透率已达显著水平），产生电网稳定性和频率调节需求；用于频率调节、太阳能出力稳定和削峰的BESS具有商业可行性。出口商在出货前应直接核实现行OHN和CREE受监管产品要求。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全國家法規，將IEC 62619認證作為上市或進口前置條件。OHN（宏都拉斯標準化機構）是宏都拉斯國家標準機構，負責採納和發布宏都拉斯國家標準（NHN）；截至本數據集日期，尚未確認OHN已發布等同於基於IEC 62619認證路徑的強制性BESS專屬產品安全技術法規——須在出貨前直接向OHN和CREE核實現行OHN受監管產品清單。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，預計將在國際開發融資機構（IDB——美洲開發銀行、CAF——拉丁美洲開發銀行、世界銀行/IFC）資助的宏都拉斯BESS項目採購規格，以及公用事業規模項目的CREE持牌工程審查和ENEE併網技術評估中被要求。宏都拉斯對BESS的需求背景真實：宏都拉斯太陽能滲透率高（可再生能源滲透率已達顯著水平），產生電網穩定性和頻率調節需求；用於頻率調節、太陽能出力穩定和削峰的BESS具有商業可行性。出口商在出貨前應直接核實現行OHN和CREE受監管產品要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Honduras project specifications and development-finance procurement)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)
OHN — Organismo Hondureño de Normalización — Honduras national standards body; verify current NHN regulated-product list and any mandatory BESS-specific technical regulation directly with OHN
CREE — Comisión Reguladora de Energía Eléctrica — verify equipment safety evidence requirements for CREE-licensed BESS project approval directly with CREE

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Honduras project specifications or international development finance procurement conditions. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance in order to meet international project finance and engineering review expectations for Honduras BESS projects.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被洪都拉斯项目规格或国际开发融资采购条件接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。为满足洪都拉斯BESS项目的国际项目融资和工程审查预期，出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被宏都拉斯項目規格或國際開發融資採購條件接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。為滿足宏都拉斯BESS項目的國際項目融資和工程審查預期，出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Gap: International project developers, development finance institutions (IDB, CAF, World Bank/IFC), and CREE-licensed engineering reviewers for Honduras BESS projects reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or development finance procurement conditions. Exporters should: (a) verify the current OHN regulated-product list and CREE equipment-safety requirements for any mandatory pre-shipment obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Honduras BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or CREE engineering review before committing to a test programme; (d) engage with the relevant development finance institution's environmental and social standards team early in the project to confirm equipment certification expectations, as IDB, CAF, and World Bank/IFC procurement rules may impose additional requirements beyond national Honduran regulations.
gap.zh: 差距：洪都拉斯BESS项目的国际项目开发商、开发融资机构（IDB、CAF、世界银行/IFC）及CREE持牌工程审查人员将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或开发融资采购条件接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行OHN受监管产品清单和CREE设备安全要求，确认是否存在强制装运前义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至洪都拉斯BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或CREE工程审查中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）在项目早期与相关开发融资机构的环境和社会标准团队接触，确认设备认证预期，因为IDB、CAF和世界银行/IFC采购规则可能在洪都拉斯国家法规之外施加额外要求。
gap.zht: 差距：宏都拉斯BESS項目的國際項目開發商、開發融資機構（IDB、CAF、世界銀行/IFC）及CREE持牌工程審查人員將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或開發融資採購條件接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行OHN受監管產品清單和CREE設備安全要求，確認是否存在強制裝運前義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至宏都拉斯BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或CREE工程審查中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）在項目早期與相關開發融資機構的環境和社會標準團隊接觸，確認設備認證預期，因為IDB、CAF和世界銀行/IFC採購規則可能在宏都拉斯國家法規之外施加額外要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where international development finance or CREE-licensed engineering reviews require IEC 62619 compliance; OHN mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS specifically has not been confirmed — verify directly with OHN and CREE
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is accepted as IEC 62619 equivalent for Honduras project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation requiring IEC 62619 certification has been identified for Honduras as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Honduras project specifications, development-finance procurement requirements, and CREE-licensed engineering reviews. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Honduras project acceptance under international finance and engineering review frameworks. Verify OHN current regulated-product scope and CREE equipment-safety evidence requirements with the project owner, development finance institution, and CREE before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，洪都拉斯尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规要求IEC 62619认证；然而，IEC 62619是洪都拉斯项目规格、开发融资采购要求和CREE持牌工程审查中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证，在国际融资和工程审查框架下不足以满足洪都拉斯项目验收要求。出货前请向项目业主、开发融资机构及CREE核实OHN现行受监管产品范围和CREE设备安全证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，宏都拉斯尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規要求IEC 62619認證；然而，IEC 62619是宏都拉斯項目規格、開發融資採購要求和CREE持牌工程審查中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證，在國際融資和工程審查框架下不足以滿足宏都拉斯項目驗收要求。出貨前請向項目業主、開發融資機構及CREE核實OHN現行受監管產品範圍和CREE設備安全證據要求。
